candidates.snippet: ontact us . Eksell Display is a unique typeface from 1962, designed by the legendary swedish designer Olle Eksell (1918–2007). Olle was a prolific artist who couldn’t resist sketching out whatever ideas came to mind. His

s and developed a family of four optical styles, including a stencil version. Have fun with it, we think Olle did. Year 2015 Designed by Olle Eksell Göran Söderström Krista Radoeva																						(Cyrillic) George
